title: scutellaria ovata subsp. rupestris
intro: Scutellaria ovata subsp. rupestris, also known as rock skullcap, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of rock skullcap include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Rock skullcap can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are available in health food stores and online, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
